name: Speciality Restaurants Limited
summary: Speciality Restaurants Limited owns and operates restaurant outlets and sweet shops in India. The company operates its restaurants under the Mainland China, Oh! Calcutta, Asia Kitchen by Mainland China, Sigree, Sigree Global Grill, Flame & Grill, Caf√É¬© Mezzuna, Hoppipola, Gong Modern Asian, POH, Spicery by Sigree, Jungle Safari, Haka, Machaan, and Zoodles brand names; and confectionaries and cafes under the Sweet Bengal and Dariole brands, as well as bars under the Hay and Episode One brands. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 109 restaurants, including 26 franchise restaurants; and 31 confectionaries. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Mumbai, India.
